name: tokengraph
description: Reduce wasted Codex context with local code, SQL, memory, and log routing.

interface.shortDescription: Route Codex through compact local project context before raw files.
interface.longDescription: TokenGraph indexes the current project locally and gives Codex a compact code graph, SQL graph, memory graph, project map, index freshness status, reset controls, context planner, log compressor, and token savings report. It does not require a paid API key or cloud service.
defaultPrompt: Plan context before reading raw files.
